input: Create a system prompt for a financial advisor assistant targeting Claude Projects
expected_behavior: Produces full Playbook format: Role & Archetype (composite identity), Objective, Parameters, Interaction Flow (3 phases), Constraints, Key Questions, Output Template, Self-Correction Triggers. Platform-specific formatting for Claude Projects.

input: Review this prompt: 'You are a helpful assistant. Help users with their questions.'
expected_behavior: Scores against 10-criterion rubric (Foundation through Value), identifies low-scoring dimensions (Foundation, Density, Depth likely fail), delivers prioritized fix list with specific improvements per criterion.

input: Optimize this marketing copywriter prompt to be more effective
expected_behavior: Identifies weakest rubric dimensions, applies targeted improvements (density compression, constraint sharpening, flow restructuring), re-evaluates to confirm improvement, delivers before/after comparison.

input: My AI assistant keeps giving generic answers instead of specific recommendations. Fix the prompt.
expected_behavior: Diagnoses failure pattern (likely weak constraints or missing output template), applies surgical fix to specific section, adds self-correction trigger to prevent recurrence, explains root cause.

input: Port this Claude Project prompt to a Custom GPT
expected_behavior: Maps Claude features to GPT equivalents (Project instructions to Instructions field, knowledge files to uploaded files, MCP to Actions), adjusts token limits, replaces unsupported features, documents what was lost in porting.
